heading: Monolith Design Tokens
intro: Design systems are living architectures. This interactive token panel showcases the foundational colors, segmented controllers, and micro-interaction behaviors developed for Diqing's personal projects.

mono.name: Charcoal Primary
mono.usage: Main headings, high contrast text blocks

mono.name: Silver Border
mono.usage: Subtle lines, grid markers, layout borders

typeB.label: CONTROL TYPE B / ORGANIC RESPONSES
typeB.heading: Tactile Micro-Switch
typeB.caption: Organic easing feels comfortable and lightweight

layerIndex.heading: 03 / Layer Depth Index
layerIndex.body: Our layout nodes rely on an incremental depth-of-field spatial stacking index. Absolute layers stack from the grid substrate (Z-0) up to modal triggers (Z-50), keeping layout hierarchies clear and preventing overlaps.
